creator: kazarov@izmiran.rssi.ru
text:
When I load a kernel without SMP support (the same config with SMP and
APIC_IO lines commented out) USB works correctly - it detects detachment and
reattachment of devices without andy delay while in SMP mode there was a
delay about 10-20 sec on detachment and before disabling port after
reattachment.
BTW, system does not sees second USB port - neither with SMP nor without
SMP. Windows works with both ports the same way.

Dmitry
